name: LapEE OS Unified Kernel Image
cve-notes: LapEE OS UKIs are pinned to an immutable kernel image + initramfs hash + cmdline, all measured into PCR 11/12/13 by systemd-stub at boot.
notes: The LapEE reference OS boots via sd-boot chaining into a systemd-stub-wrapped UKI at `\EFI\Linux\lapee-os.efi`. The UKI image carries .linux / .initrd / .cmdline / .osrel / .uname PE sections whose SHA-256 hashes are extended into PCR 11. Tier-3 evidence for claim.tme / claim.lockdown fires when the PCR 11 hash matches a known LapEE release.
